positive: A minimalist, highly stylized cosmic jungle scene, featuring a group of diverse celestial flora and fauna. The primary elements include bioluminescent deep-sea coral forms intertwining with stylized crescent moons, nebula gas clouds forming abstract shapes, and silhouette representations of whimsical, floating mythological creatures (like gentle sky dragons or stylized jellyfish). Use a deep indigo and teal color palette contrasted sharply with neon magenta and electric lime accents. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, designed as a seamless, isolated sticker graphic. Style should emulate sophisticated line art combined with high-contrast vector illustration, ensuring clean edges and strong silhouettes suitable for screen printing. Cinematic, ethereal lighting, pure digital artwork, flat graphic design.
